blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! You now have the foundational knowledge to create and run k6 performance tests.

Throughout this journey you:

- Learned the value of performance testing with k6
- Installed k6 on your machine
- Wrote your first test script with HTTP requests and checks
- Ran a test locally and reviewed results in your terminal
- Sent test results to Grafana Cloud
- Analyzed results in Grafana Cloud dashboards

Continue your k6 learning by exploring:

- **Advanced test scripting**: Multiple requests, data parameterization, and custom logic
- **Thresholds and checks**: Automatic pass/fail criteria for test results
- **Browser testing**: Test web applications with real browser automation using k6 browser
- **CI/CD integration**: Add k6 tests to your continuous integration pipeline
In Grafana Cloud, go to **Testing & synthetics > Performance** to explore the interactive onboarding: try k6 Studio, OpenAPI to k6, and running tests from the UI.
